Scripts.OnClick: GF_WhisperHistoryButtonPressed(self:GetID())
Scripts.OnMouseDown: if arg1 == "RightButton" and self:GetID() > 1 then GF_ToggleWhisperDropDownMenu(self,self:GetID(),arg1) end

Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide()
Scripts.OnClick: if self:GetChecked() then PlaySound("igMainMenuOptionCheckBoxOff") else PlaySound("igMainMenuOptionCheckBoxOn") end GF_WhisperHistoryPriorityListCheckButtonPressed(self:GetID(),getglobal("GF_WhisperHistoryButton"..self:GetID()):GetText(),self:GetChecked())

Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide()
GameTooltip:Hide()
Scripts.OnClick: if self:GetChecked() then PlaySound("igMainMenuOptionCheckBoxOff") else PlaySound("igMainMenuOptionCheckBoxOn") end

Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide() if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or string.sub(GetMouseFocus():GetName(),1,10) ~= string.sub(self:GetParent():GetName(),1,10) then self:GetParent():Hide() end
Scripts.OnClick: if self:GetChecked() then PlaySound("igMainMenuOptionCheckBoxOff") else PlaySound("igMainMenuOptionCheckBoxOn") end

Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide() if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), self:GetParent():GetName()) then GF_MenusToHide[self:GetParent():GetName()] = {self:GetParent():GetName(),GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end
Scripts.OnClick: GF_ButtonListFunctions(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d","").."AddRemove",getglobal(self:GetName().."TextLabel"):GetText(),GF_ButtonIDAliases[string.sub(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d",""),4)][getglobal(self:GetName().."TextLabel"):GetText()],self:GetChecked()) if GF_AutoAnnounceTimer and string.find(self:GetName(),"LFG") then GF_TurnOffAnnounce(GF_AUTO_ANNOUNCE_SETTINGS_CHANGED) end
GF_BlacklistAddPlayerDialogOKButton_OnCLick()
self:GetParent():Hide()
self:GetParent():Hide()

Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide() GF_ResultItem_Hover_Off(self:GetParent())

Scripts.OnClick: GF_GetGroupWhoButton(self:GetParent(),self:GetParent():GetID())
Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide() GF_ResultItem_Hover_Off(self:GetParent())

Scripts.OnClick: GF_LFGInviteButton(self:GetParent(),self:GetParent():GetID())
Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide() GF_ResultItem_Hover_Off(self:GetParent())

Scripts.OnClick: GF_LFMWhisperRequestInviteButton(self:GetParent(),self:GetParent():GetID())
Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide() GF_ResultItem_Hover_Off(self:GetParent())

Scripts.OnClick: GF_EditPlayerNote(GF_FilteredResultsList[GF_ResultsListOffset+self:GetParent():GetID()].op)
Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide()
GF_ResultItem_Hover_Off(self,self:GetID())

Scripts.OnClick: GF_DeletePlayer(self:GetParent():GetID())
GF_EditBlackListItem(self:GetName())

Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide()
GameTooltip:Hide()

Scripts.OnClick: if arg1 == "RightButton" then self:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide()

Scripts.OnClick: GF_ToggleMainFrame()
Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide()

Scripts.OnClick: GF_ToggleMainFrame()
if GF_DamageMeterFrame:IsVisible() then GF_DamageMeterFrame:Hide() GF_PerCharVariables.dpsmetershown = false else GF_DamageMeterFrame:Show() GF_PerCharVariables.dpsmetershown = true end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.autofilter = true else GF_PerCharVariables.autofilter = false end GF_ApplyFiltersToGroupList(true)
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.playsounds = true else GF_PerCharVariables.playsounds = false end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.showlfm = true else GF_PerCharVariables.showlfm = false end GF_GetGroupFilters() GF_ApplyFiltersToGroupList(true)
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.showlfg = true else GF_PerCharVariables.showlfg = false end GF_GetGroupFilters() GF_ApplyFiltersToGroupList(true)
if not GF_GroupFilterDropdownMenu:IsShown() then GF_GroupFilterDropdownMenu:Show() else GF_GroupFilterDropdownMenu:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "GF_GroupFilter") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_GroupFilterDropdownMenu"] = {"GF_GroupFilter",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.showdungeons = true else GF_PerCharVariables.showdungeons = false end GF_GetGroupFilters() GF_ApplyFiltersToGroupList(true)
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.showraids = true else GF_PerCharVariables.showraids = false end GF_GetGroupFilters() GF_ApplyFiltersToGroupList(true)
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.showquests = true else GF_PerCharVariables.showquests = false end GF_GetGroupFilters() GF_ApplyFiltersToGroupList(true)
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.showother = true else GF_PerCharVariables.showother = false end GF_GetGroupFilters() GF_ApplyFiltersToGroupList(true)
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.showtank = true else GF_PerCharVariables.showtank = false end GF_GetGroupFilters() GF_ApplyFiltersToGroupList(true)
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.showhealer = true else GF_PerCharVariables.showhealer = false end GF_GetGroupFilters() GF_ApplyFiltersToGroupList(true)
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.showdps = true else GF_PerCharVariables.showdps = false end GF_GetGroupFilters() GF_ApplyFiltersToGroupList(true)

Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "GF_GroupFilter") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_GroupFilterDropdownMenu"] = {"GF_GroupFilter",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: if not GF_LFGHardCore:IsShown() then GF_ButtonListFunctions(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d","").."Show") else GF_LFGHardCore:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "LFGHardCore") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LFGHardCore"] = {"LFGHardCore",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: if not GF_ChatFilterDropdownMenu:IsShown() then GF_ChatFilterDropdownMenu:Show() else GF_ChatFilterDropdownMenu:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "GF_ChatFilter") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_ChatFilterDropdownMenu"] = {"GF_ChatFilter",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.showgroupsinchat = true else GF_SavedVariables.showgroupsinchat = false end GF_SavedVariables.showgroupsnewonly = GF_ChatFilterGroupsNewOnlyCheckButton:SetChecked(false)

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.showgroupsnewonly = true else GF_SavedVariables.showgroupsnewonly = false end GF_SavedVariables.showgroupsinchat = GF_ChatFilterGroupsInChatCheckButton:SetChecked(false)
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.showgroupsinminimap = true else GF_SavedVariables.showgroupsinminimap = false end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.showchattexts = true else GF_SavedVariables.showchattexts = false end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.showtradestexts = true else GF_SavedVariables.showtradestexts = false end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.showguilds = true else GF_SavedVariables.showguilds = false end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.showloottexts = true else GF_SavedVariables.showloottexts = false end

Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "GF_ChatFilter") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_ChatFilterDropdownMenu"] = {"GF_ChatFilter",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.usewhoongroups = true else GF_SavedVariables.usewhoongroups = false end GF_UpdateResults() if not GF_SavedVariables.usewhoongroups then GF_WhoQueue = {} for name,data in pairs(GF_SavedVariables.friendsToRemove) do if data > time() then GF_SavedVariables.friendsToRemove[name] = nil end end end
if not GF_SearchList:IsShown() then GF_ButtonListFunctions(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d","").."Show") else GF_SearchList:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "SearchList") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_SearchList"] = {"SearchList",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "SearchList") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_SearchList"] = {"SearchList",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end
GameTooltip:Hide()

Scripts.OnClick: GF_PerCharVariables.searchbuttonstext = {} GF_PerCharVariables.searchtext = "" GF_GroupsFrameDescriptionEditBox:SetText("") GF_SearchListDropdown:UnlockHighlight() GF_SearchListClearButton:Hide() GF_ApplyFiltersToGroupList(true)
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "SearchList") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_SearchList"] = {"SearchList",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "LFGHardCore") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LFGHardCore"] = {"LFGHardCore",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end
GameTooltip:Hide()
Scripts.OnClick: if GF_SavedVariables.mainframestatus == 1 then GF_SavedVariables.mainframestatus = 0 GF_ToggleMainFrame(3) else GF_SavedVariables.mainframestatus = 1 GF_ResultsListOffset = 0 GF_ToggleMainFrame(3) end

Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide()
Scripts.OnClick: if GF_SavedVariables.mainframestatus == 2 then GF_SavedVariables.mainframestatus = 0 GF_ToggleMainFrame(3) else GF_SavedVariables.mainframestatus = 2 GF_ResultsListOffset = 0 GF_ToggleMainFrame(3) end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.mainframeheight = true else GF_SavedVariables.mainframeheight = false end GF_ToggleMainFrame(3)
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.mainframewidth = true else GF_SavedVariables.mainframewidth = false end GF_ToggleMainFrame(3)

Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide()
Scripts.OnClick: if GF_MainFrameShowBoth then GF_MainFrameShowBoth = nil GF_ToggleMainFrame(5) else GF_MainFrameShowBoth = true GF_ToggleMainFrame(4) end
GF_GroupsFrame:Show() GF_LogFrame:Hide() GF_SettingsFrame:Hide() GF_BlackListFrame:Hide() GF_UpdateBlackListItems() GF_SavedVariables.mainframelogisopen = false
GF_GroupsFrame:Hide() GF_LogFrame:Hide() GF_SettingsFrame:Show() GF_BlackListFrame:Hide() GF_UpdateBlackListItems()
GF_GroupsFrame:Hide() GF_LogFrame:Hide() GF_SettingsFrame:Hide() GF_BlackListFrame:Show() GF_UpdateBlackListItems()
GF_GroupsFrame:Hide() GF_LogFrame:Show() GF_SettingsFrame:Hide() GF_BlackListFrame:Hide() GF_UpdateBlackListItems() GF_SavedVariables.mainframelogisopen = true

if GF_AutoAnnounceTimer then GF_TurnOffAnnounce(GF_AUTO_ANNOUNCE_TURNED_OFF) else if GF_LFGDescriptionEditBox:GetText() ~= "" then GF_TurnOnAnnounce() else DEFAULT_CHAT_FRAME:AddMessage("GF: "..GF_NOTHING_TO_ANNOUNCE2, 1, 1, 0.5) end end
GF_ClickQueueLFT()
Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide()

Scripts.OnClick: if GF_PerCharVariables.getwhoshown then GF_PerCharVariables.getwhoshown = nil else GF_PerCharVariables.getwhoshown = true end GF_LFGGetWhoUpdateOffset() GF_UpdateMainFrameHeight() GF_UpdateMainFrameWidth() GF_UpdateMainFrame() GF_UpdateResults()

if GF_PerCharVariables.lfgshown then GF_PerCharVariables.lfgshown = nil else GF_PerCharVariables.lfgshown = true end GF_LFGGetWhoUpdateOffset() GF_UpdateMainFrameHeight() GF_UpdateMainFrameWidth() GF_UpdateMainFrame() GF_UpdateResults()
GF_ToggleGetWho()
if not GF_GetWhoClass:IsShown() then GF_ButtonListFunctions(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d","").."Show") else GF_GetWhoClass:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "GetWhoClass") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_GetWhoClass"] = {"GetWhoClass",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "GetWhoClass") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_GetWhoClass"] = {"GetWhoClass",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: if not GF_GetWhoLevel:IsShown() then GF_ButtonListFunctions(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d","").."Show") else GF_GetWhoLevel:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "GetWhoLevel") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_GetWhoLevel"] = {"GetWhoLevel",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "GetWhoLevel") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_GetWhoLevel"] = {"GetWhoLevel",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end
GameTooltip:Hide()
Scripts.OnEditFocusLost: GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgwhispertext = GF_GetWhoWhisperEditBox:GetText() self:HighlightText(string.len(self:GetText())+1) if GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgwhispertext ~= "" then GF_GetWhoClearButton:Show() else GF_GetWhoClearButton:Hide() end
Scripts.OnTabPressed: GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgwhispertext = GF_GetWhoWhisperEditBox:GetText() self:ClearFocus() self:HighlightText(string.len(self:GetText())+1) if GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgwhispertext ~= "" then GF_GetWhoClearButton:Show() else GF_GetWhoClearButton:Hide() end
Scripts.OnEnterPressed: GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgwhispertext = GF_GetWhoWhisperEditBox:GetText() self:ClearFocus() self:HighlightText(string.len(self:GetText())+1) if GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgwhispertext ~= "" then GF_GetWhoClearButton:Show() else GF_GetWhoClearButton:Hide() end
Scripts.OnEscapePressed: GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgwhispertext = GF_GetWhoWhisperEditBox:GetText() self:ClearFocus() self:HighlightText(string.len(self:GetText())+1) if GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgwhispertext ~= "" then GF_GetWhoClearButton:Show() else GF_GetWhoClearButton:Hide() end

Scripts.OnClick: GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgwhispertext = "" GF_GetWhoWhisperEditBox:SetText("") GF_GetWhoClearButton:Hide()
GF_GetWhoSkipPlayer()
GF_GetWhoSendWhisperToAvailablePlayer()
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.lfgauto = true else GF_PerCharVariables.lfgauto = false end GF_FixLFGStrings(true)
GF_LFGLFM:Hide() GF_LFGDungeon:Hide() GF_LFGRaid:Hide() GF_LFGRole:Hide() if not GF_LFGSize:IsShown() then GF_ButtonListFunctions(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d","").."Show") else GF_LFGSize:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "LFGSize") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LFGSize"] = {"LFGSize",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "LFGSize") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LFGSize"] = {"LFGSize",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: GF_LFGSize:Hide() GF_LFGDungeon:Hide() GF_LFGRaid:Hide() GF_LFGRole:Hide() if not GF_LFGLFM:IsShown() then GF_ButtonListFunctions(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d","").."Show") else GF_LFGLFM:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "LFGLFM") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LFGLFM"] = {"LFGLFM",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "LFGLFM") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LFGLFM"] = {"LFGLFM",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: GF_LFGSize:Hide() GF_LFGLFM:Hide() GF_LFGRaid:Hide() GF_LFGRole:Hide() if not GF_LFGDungeon:IsShown() then GF_ButtonListFunctions(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d","").."Show") else GF_LFGDungeon:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "LFGDungeon") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LFGDungeon"] = {"LFGDungeon",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "LFGDungeon") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LFGDungeon"] = {"LFGDungeon",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: GF_LFGSize:Hide() GF_LFGLFM:Hide() GF_LFGDungeon:Hide() GF_LFGRole:Hide() if not GF_LFGRaid:IsShown() then GF_ButtonListFunctions(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d","").."Show") else GF_LFGRaid:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "LFGRaid") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LFGRaid"] = {"LFGRaid",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "LFGRaid") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LFGRaid"] = {"LFGRaid",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: GF_LFGSize:Hide() GF_LFGLFM:Hide() GF_LFGDungeon:Hide() GF_LFGRaid:Hide() if not GF_LFGRole:IsShown() then GF_ButtonListFunctions(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d","").."Show") else GF_LFGRole:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "LFGRole") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LFGRole"] = {"LFGRole",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "LFGRole") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LFGRole"] = {"LFGRole",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.lfglevel = true else GF_PerCharVariables.lfglevel = false end GF_FixLFGStrings()
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.lfgtank = true else GF_PerCharVariables.lfgtank = false end GF_FixLFGStrings() GF_UpdateQueueLFTButton()
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.lfgheal = true else GF_PerCharVariables.lfgheal = false end GF_FixLFGStrings() GF_UpdateQueueLFTButton()
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.lfgdps = true else GF_PerCharVariables.lfgdps = false end GF_FixLFGStrings() GF_UpdateQueueLFTButton()

Scripts.OnEditFocusLost: GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgtext = GF_LFGDescriptionEditBox:GetText() self:HighlightText(string.len(self:GetText())+1) if GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgtext ~= "" then GF_LFGDescriptionClearButton:Show() else GF_LFGDescriptionClearButton:Hide() end GF_UpdateQueueLFTButton()
Scripts.OnTabPressed: GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgtext = GF_LFGDescriptionEditBox:GetText() self:ClearFocus() self:HighlightText(string.len(self:GetText())+1) if GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgtext ~= "" then GF_LFGDescriptionClearButton:Show() else GF_LFGDescriptionClearButton:Hide() end GF_UpdateQueueLFTButton()
Scripts.OnEnterPressed: GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgtext = GF_LFGDescriptionEditBox:GetText() self:ClearFocus() self:HighlightText(string.len(self:GetText())+1) if GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgtext ~= "" then GF_LFGDescriptionClearButton:Show() else GF_LFGDescriptionClearButton:Hide() end GF_UpdateQueueLFTButton()
Scripts.OnEscapePressed: GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgtext = GF_LFGDescriptionEditBox:GetText() self:ClearFocus() self:HighlightText(string.len(self:GetText())+1) if GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgtext ~= "" then GF_LFGDescriptionClearButton:Show() else GF_LFGDescriptionClearButton:Hide() end GF_UpdateQueueLFTButton()

Scripts.OnClick: GF_PerCharVariables.searchlfgtext = "" GF_LFGDescriptionEditBox:SetText("") GF_LFGDescriptionClearButton:Hide() if GF_AutoAnnounceTimer then GF_TurnOffAnnounce(GF_AUTO_ANNOUNCE_TURNED_OFF) end GF_UpdateQueueLFTButton()

Scripts.OnValueChanged: if self:GetValue() > 10 then GF_SavedVariables.announcetimer = (self:GetValue()-10)*300 + 600 getglobal(self:GetName().."Label"):SetText((GF_SavedVariables.announcetimer/60).." -"..GF_MINUTES) else GF_SavedVariables.announcetimer = self:GetValue()*60 getglobal(self:GetName().."Label"):SetText((GF_SavedVariables.announcetimer/60).." -"..GF_MINUTES) end if GF_AutoAnnounceTimer then GF_AnnounceToLFGButton:SetText(GF_ANNOUNCE_STOP_ANNOUNCE.."-"..GF_SavedVariables.announcetimer - GF_AutoAnnounceTimer) end

Scripts.OnClick: if GF_ResultsListOffset > 0 then GF_ResultsListOffset = math.max(GF_ResultsListOffset - GF_ResultsListOffsetSize,0) GF_UpdateResults() end
if getn(GF_FilteredResultsList) > GF_ResultsListOffset + GF_ResultsListOffsetSize then GF_ResultsListOffset = GF_ResultsListOffset + GF_ResultsListOffsetSize GF_UpdateResults() end

Scripts.OnMouseWheel: if GF_SavedVariables.mainframestatus == 0 then if arg1 == -1 and getn(GF_FilteredResultsList) > GF_ResultsListOffset + GF_ResultsListOffsetSize then if GF_ResultsListOffset + GF_ResultsListOffsetSize + 3 > getn(GF_FilteredResultsList) then GF_ResultsListOffset = GF_ResultsListOffset + (getn(GF_FilteredResultsList) - (GF_ResultsListOffset + GF_ResultsListOffsetSize)) if GF_ResultsListOffset < 0 then GF_ResultsListOffset = 0 end GF_UpdateResults() else GF_ResultsListOffset = GF_ResultsListOffset + 3 GF_UpdateResults() end elseif arg1 == 1 and GF_ResultsListOffset > 0 then GF_ResultsListOffset = math.max(GF_ResultsListOffset - 3,0) GF_UpdateResults() end end

Scripts.OnClick: if GF_BlackListOffset >0 then GF_BlackListOffset = GF_BlackListOffset - 20 GF_UpdateBlackListItems() end
if getn(GF_BlackList[GF_RealmName]) >GF_BlackListOffset + 20 then GF_BlackListOffset = GF_BlackListOffset + 20 GF_UpdateBlackListItems() end
GF_AddPlayerFrame:Show()
PlaySound("igChatBottom") self:GetParent():ScrollToBottom()

Scripts.OnMouseDown: PlaySound("igChatScrollDown") self:GetParent():ScrollDown() self:GetParent():ScrollDown() self:GetParent():ScrollDown() self:GetParent():ScrollDown() self:GetParent():ScrollDown()
PlaySound("igChatScrollUp") self:GetParent():ScrollUp() self:GetParent():ScrollUp() self:GetParent():ScrollUp() self:GetParent():ScrollUp() self:GetParent():ScrollUp()

Scripts.OnMouseWheel: if arg1 == 1 then self:ScrollUp() self:ScrollUp() self:ScrollUp() else self:ScrollDown() self:ScrollDown() self:ScrollDown() end GameTooltip:Hide()

Scripts.OnClick: GF_LogChannelFilterDropdownMenu:Hide() GF_LogChannelName:Hide() if not GF_LogFilterDropdownMenu:IsShown() then GF_LogFilterDropdownMenu:Show() else GF_LogFilterDropdownMenu:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "GF_LogFilter") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LogFilterDropdownMenu"] = {"GF_LogFilter",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logshowgroup = true else GF_SavedVariables.logshowgroup = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logshowgroup then GF_LogFilters[1] = true GF_LogFilters[2] = true else GF_LogFilters[1] = nil GF_LogFilters[2] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logshowfiltered = true else GF_SavedVariables.logshowfiltered = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logshowfiltered then GF_LogFilters[3] = true else GF_LogFilters[3] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logshowchat = true else GF_SavedVariables.logshowchat = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logshowchat then GF_LogFilters[5] = true else GF_LogFilters[5] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logshowtrades = true else GF_SavedVariables.logshowtrades = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logshowtrades then GF_LogFilters[9] = true else GF_LogFilters[9] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logshowguilds = true else GF_SavedVariables.logshowguilds = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logshowguilds then GF_LogFilters[8] = true else GF_LogFilters[8] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logshowloot = true else GF_SavedVariables.logshowloot = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logshowloot then GF_LogFilters[6] = true else GF_LogFilters[6] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logshowspam = true else GF_SavedVariables.logshowspam = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logshowspam then GF_LogFilters[7] = true else GF_LogFilters[7] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logshowblacklist = true else GF_SavedVariables.logshowblacklist = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logshowblacklist then GF_LogFilters[10] = true else GF_LogFilters[10] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logshowbelowlevel = true else GF_SavedVariables.logshowbelowlevel = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logshowbelowlevel then GF_LogFilters[11] = true else GF_LogFilters[11] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "GF_LogFilter") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LogFilterDropdownMenu"] = {"GF_LogFilter",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: GF_LogFilterDropdownMenu:Hide() GF_LogChannelName:Hide() if not GF_LogChannelFilterDropdownMenu:IsShown() then GF_LogChannelFilterDropdownMenu:Show() else GF_LogChannelFilterDropdownMenu:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "GF_LogChannelFilter") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LogChannelFilterDropdownMenu"] = {"GF_LogChannelFilter",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logchannels = true else GF_SavedVariables.logchannels = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logchannels then GF_LogFilters["CHANNEL"] = true else GF_LogFilters["CHANNEL"] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logparty = true else GF_SavedVariables.logparty = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logparty then GF_LogFilters["PARTY"] = true GF_LogFilters["RAID"] = true GF_LogFilters["RAID_LEADER"] = true GF_LogFilters["RAID_WARNING"] = true GF_LogFilters["BATTLEGROUND"] = true GF_LogFilters["BATTLEGROUND_LEADER"] = true else GF_LogFilters["PARTY"] = nil GF_LogFilters["RAID"] = nil GF_LogFilters["RAID_LEADER"] = nil GF_LogFilters["RAID_WARNING"] = nil GF_LogFilters["BATTLEGROUND"] = nil GF_LogFilters["BATTLEGROUND_LEADER"] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logguild = true else GF_SavedVariables.logguild = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logguild then GF_LogFilters["GUILD"] = true GF_LogFilters["OFFICER"] = true else GF_LogFilters["GUILD"] = nil GF_LogFilters["OFFICER"] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logwhisper = true else GF_SavedVariables.logwhisper = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logwhisper then GF_LogFilters["WHISPER"] = true GF_LogFilters["WHISPER_INFORM"] = true else GF_LogFilters["WHISPER"] = nil GF_LogFilters["WHISPER_INFORM"] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logsay = true else GF_SavedVariables.logsay = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logsay then GF_LogFilters["SAY"] = true else GF_LogFilters["SAY"] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.logyell = true else GF_SavedVariables.logyell = false end if GF_SavedVariables.logyell then GF_LogFilters["YELL"] = true else GF_LogFilters["YELL"] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.loghardcore = true else GF_SavedVariables.loghardcore = false end if GF_SavedVariables.loghardcore then GF_LogFilters["HARDCORE"] = true GF_LogFilters["SYSTEM"] = true else GF_LogFilters["HARDCORE"] = nil GF_LogFilters["SYSTEM"] = nil end if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() end

Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "GF_LogChannelFilter") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LogChannelFilterDropdownMenu"] = {"GF_LogChannelFilter",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: GF_LogFilterDropdownMenu:Hide() GF_LogChannelFilterDropdownMenu:Hide() if not GF_LogChannelName:IsShown() then GF_ButtonListFunctions(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d","").."Show") else GF_LogChannelName:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "LogChannelName") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LogChannelName"] = {"LogChannelName",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "LogChannelName") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_LogChannelName"] = {"LogChannelName",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: if GF_WhisperLogOffset > 0 then GF_WhisperLogOffset = math.max(GF_WhisperLogOffset - 18,0) if GF_SavedVariables.showwhisperlogs == 1 then GF_WhisperHistoryUpdateFrame() elseif GF_SavedVariables.showwhisperlogs == 2 then GF_GroupHistoryUpdateFrame() end end

if GF_SavedVariables.showwhisperlogs == 1 and getn(GF_WhisperLogData[GF_RealmName]) > GF_WhisperLogOffset + 19 then GF_WhisperLogOffset = GF_WhisperLogOffset + 18 GF_WhisperHistoryUpdateFrame() elseif GF_SavedVariables.showwhisperlogs == 2 and getn(GF_GroupHistory[GF_RealmName]) > GF_WhisperLogOffset + 19 then GF_WhisperLogOffset = GF_WhisperLogOffset + 18 GF_GroupHistoryUpdateFrame() end

if GF_SavedVariables.showwhisperlogs == 1 then GF_SavedVariables.showwhisperlogs = false else GF_SavedVariables.showwhisperlogs = 1 GF_WhisperLogOffset = 0 GF_WhisperHistoryUpdateFrame() end GF_UpdateMainFrameWidth()

if GF_SavedVariables.showwhisperlogs == 2 then GF_SavedVariables.showwhisperlogs = false else GF_SavedVariables.showwhisperlogs = 2 GF_WhisperLogOffset = 0 GF_GroupHistoryUpdateFrame() end GF_UpdateMainFrameWidth()

if GF_ConvertMessagesToLinks then GF_ConvertMessagesToLinks = nil GF_ConvertLogMessagesToURL:SetText(GF_LOG_CONVERT_URL) GF_ConvertLogMessagesToURL:UnlockHighlight() else GF_ConvertMessagesToLinks = true GF_ConvertLogMessagesToURL:SetText(GF_LOG_RESET_MESSAGES) GF_ConvertLogMessagesToURL:LockHighlight() end for i=GF_Log:GetCurrentScroll(),1000 do if GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 0 then GF_DisplayLog() elseif GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID == 1 then GF_WhisperHistoryDisplayLog("Guild") else GF_WhisperHistoryDisplayLog(getglobal("GF_WhisperHistoryButton"..GF_WhisperLogCurrentButtonID):GetText()) end for j=1, i do GF_Log:ScrollUp() end break end

Scripts.OnMouseWheel: if GF_SavedVariables.mainframestatus == 0 or GF_MainFrameShowBoth then if GF_SavedVariables.showwhisperlogs == 1 then if arg1 == -1 and getn(GF_WhisperLogData[GF_RealmName]) > GF_WhisperLogOffset + 19 then if GF_WhisperLogOffset + 19 + 3 > getn(GF_WhisperLogData[GF_RealmName]) then GF_WhisperLogOffset = GF_WhisperLogOffset + (getn(GF_WhisperLogData[GF_RealmName]) - (GF_WhisperLogOffset + 19)) if GF_WhisperLogOffset < 0 then GF_WhisperLogOffset = 0 end GF_WhisperHistoryUpdateFrame() else GF_WhisperLogOffset = math.max(math.min(GF_WhisperLogOffset + 3,getn(GF_WhisperLogData[GF_RealmName])+1 - 19),0) GF_WhisperHistoryUpdateFrame() end elseif arg1 == 1 and GF_WhisperLogOffset > 0 then GF_WhisperLogOffset = math.max(GF_WhisperLogOffset - 3,0) GF_WhisperHistoryUpdateFrame() end elseif GF_SavedVariables.showwhisperlogs == 2 then if arg1 == -1 and getn(GF_GroupHistory[GF_RealmName]) > GF_WhisperLogOffset + 19 then if GF_WhisperLogOffset + 19 + 3 > getn(GF_GroupHistory[GF_RealmName]) then GF_WhisperLogOffset = GF_WhisperLogOffset + (getn(GF_GroupHistory[GF_RealmName]) - (GF_WhisperLogOffset + 19)) if GF_WhisperLogOffset < 0 then GF_WhisperLogOffset = 0 end GF_GroupHistoryUpdateFrame() else GF_WhisperLogOffset = math.max(math.min(GF_WhisperLogOffset + 3,getn(GF_GroupHistory[GF_RealmName]) - 19),0) GF_GroupHistoryUpdateFrame() end elseif arg1 == 1 and GF_WhisperLogOffset > 0 then GF_WhisperLogOffset = math.max(GF_WhisperLogOffset - 3,0) GF_GroupHistoryUpdateFrame() end end end

Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide()

Scripts.OnClick: GF_BlockList:Hide() if not GF_GroupChannelName:IsShown() then GF_ButtonListFunctions(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d","").."Show") else GF_GroupChannelName:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "GroupChannelName") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_GroupChannelName"] = {"GroupChannelName",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "GroupChannelName") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_GroupChannelName"] = {"GroupChannelName",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.joinworld = true else GF_SavedVariables.joinworld = false end if GF_SavedVariables.joinworld then GF_JoinWorld() else LeaveChannelByName(GF_GroupChannelEditBox:GetText()) end

Scripts.OnLeave: GameTooltip:Hide()
Scripts.OnEnterPressed: if string.len(self:GetText()) > 0 then for i=1,getn(GF_SavedVariables.blocklist) do if string.lower(GF_SavedVariables.blocklist[i]) == string.lower(self:GetText()) then table.remove(GF_BUTTONS_LIST["BlockList"],i) table.remove(GF_SavedVariables.blocklist,i) break end if i > 59 then table.remove(GF_BUTTONS_LIST["BlockList"],60) table.remove(GF_SavedVariables.blocklist,60) end end table.insert(GF_BUTTONS_LIST["BlockList"],1,{self:GetText()}) table.insert(GF_SavedVariables.blocklist,1,self:GetText()) GF_WORD_BLOCK_LIST[GF_FormatBlockListWords(self:GetText(),true)] = true self:SetText("") self:HighlightText(string.len(self:GetText())+1) end self:ClearFocus()

Scripts.OnClick: if string.len(GF_BlockListEditBox:GetText()) > 0 then for i=1,getn(GF_SavedVariables.blocklist) do if string.lower(GF_SavedVariables.blocklist[i]) == string.lower(GF_BlockListEditBox:GetText()) then table.remove(GF_BUTTONS_LIST["BlockList"],i) table.remove(GF_SavedVariables.blocklist,i) break end if i > 59 then table.remove(GF_BUTTONS_LIST["BlockList"],60) table.remove(GF_SavedVariables.blocklist,60) end end table.insert(GF_BUTTONS_LIST["BlockList"],1,{GF_BlockListEditBox:GetText()}) table.insert(GF_SavedVariables.blocklist,1,GF_BlockListEditBox:GetText()) GF_WORD_BLOCK_LIST[GF_FormatBlockListWords(GF_BlockListEditBox:GetText(),true)] = true GF_BlockListEditBox:SetText("") GF_BlockListEditBox:HighlightText(string.len(GF_BlockListEditBox:GetText())+1) end GF_BlockListEditBox:ClearFocus()
GF_GroupChannelName:Hide() if not GF_BlockList:IsShown() then GF_ButtonListFunctions(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d","").."Show") else GF_BlockList:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "BlockList") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_BlockList"] = {"BlockList",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "BlockList") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_BlockList"] = {"BlockList",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnValueChanged: if self:GetValue() > 21 then GF_SavedVariables.spamfilterduration = (self:GetValue()-21)*300 + 600 getglobal(self:GetName().."Label"):SetText((GF_SavedVariables.spamfilterduration/60)..GF_MINUTES) elseif self:GetValue() > 12 then GF_SavedVariables.spamfilterduration = (self:GetValue()-11)*60 getglobal(self:GetName().."Label"):SetText((GF_SavedVariables.spamfilterduration/60)..GF_MINUTES) elseif self:GetValue() == 12 then GF_SavedVariables.spamfilterduration = 60 getglobal(self:GetName().."Label"):SetText((GF_SavedVariables.spamfilterduration/60)..GF_MIN) else GF_SavedVariables.spamfilterduration = self:GetValue()*5 getglobal(self:GetName().."Label"):SetText(GF_SavedVariables.spamfilterduration..GF_SECONDS) end

Scripts.OnClick: if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.systemfilter = true else GF_SavedVariables.systemfilter = false end if GF_SavedVariables.systemfilter then HELP_TEXT_SIMPLE = nil else HELP_TEXT_SIMPLE = GF_HELP_TEXT_SIMPLE end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.showformattedchat = true else GF_SavedVariables.showformattedchat = false end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.alwaysshowguild = true else GF_SavedVariables.alwaysshowguild = false end
if not GF_FontName:IsShown() then GF_ButtonListFunctions(gsub(self:GetName(),"%d","").."Show") else GF_FontName:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "FontName") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_FontName"] = {"FontName",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "FontName") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_FontName"] = {"FontName",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.spamfilter = true else GF_SavedVariables.spamfilter = false end if not GF_SavedVariables.spamfilter then GF_AutomaticBlacklistCheckButton:SetChecked(false) GF_SavedVariables.autoblacklist = false end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.autoblacklist = true else GF_SavedVariables.autoblacklist = false end
if not GF_AutoBlacklistDropdownMenu:IsShown() then GF_AutoBlacklistDropdownMenu:Show() else GF_AutoBlacklistDropdownMenu:Hide() end
Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "AutoBlacklist") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_AutoBlacklistDropdownMenu"] = {"AutoBlacklist",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnClick: if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.blacklisttrades = true else GF_SavedVariables.blacklisttrades = false end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.blacklistguild = true else GF_SavedVariables.blacklistguild = false end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.blacklistchat = true else GF_SavedVariables.blacklistchat = false end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.blacklistforeign = true else GF_SavedVariables.blacklistforeign = false end

Scripts.OnLeave: if not GetMouseFocus() or not GetMouseFocus():GetName() or not string.find(GetMouseFocus():GetName(), "AutoBlacklist") then GF_MenusToHide["GF_AutoBlacklistDropdownMenu"] = {"AutoBlacklist",GetTime()} GF_OnUpdateFunctions["HideMenus"] = GF_HideDropdownMenus end

Scripts.OnValueChanged: if self:GetValue() > 10 then GF_SavedVariables.showgroupsnewonlytime = (self:GetValue()-10)*5 + 10 getglobal(self:GetName().."Label"):SetText(GF_SavedVariables.showgroupsnewonlytime..GF_MINUTES) else GF_SavedVariables.showgroupsnewonlytime = self:GetValue() getglobal(self:GetName().."Label"):SetText(GF_SavedVariables.showgroupsnewonlytime..GF_MINUTES) end

Scripts.OnClick: GF_MainFrame:SetScale(GF_SavedVariables.MainFrameUIScale/10) GF_SetStringSize()
if GF_MessageAnchorButton:IsVisible() then GF_MessageAnchorButton:Hide() else GF_MessageAnchorButton:Show() end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.squareminimap = true else GF_SavedVariables.squareminimap = false end GF_MoveMinimapIcon()

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.iconpriority = true else GF_SavedVariables.iconpriority = false end GF_SetPFUIAddonButtons() if GF_SavedVariables.iconpriority then if pfMinimap then GF_RelevelMinimapIcons(pfMinimap) else GF_RelevelMinimapIcons(Minimap) end GF_MinimapIcon:SetFrameStrata("HIGH") end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_PerCharVariables.usedpsmeter = true else GF_PerCharVariables.usedpsmeter = false end GF_SetupDPSMeter()
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.questmod = true else GF_SavedVariables.questmod = false end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.purgepfdb = true else GF_SavedVariables.purgepfdb = false end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.usefriendslist = true GF_OnUpdateFunctions["Friendslist"] = GF_UpdateWhoDataViaFriendsList else GF_SavedVariables.usefriendslist = false GF_OnUpdateFunctions["Friendslist"] = nil end
if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.clickcombos = true else GF_SavedVariables.clickcombos = false end

if self:GetChecked() then GF_SavedVariables.lfglftintegration = true GF_UpdateQueueLFTButton() else GF_SavedVariables.lfglftintegration = false GF_QueuetoLFTButton:Hide() end GF_GetGroupFilters() GF_ApplyFiltersToGroupList(true)
GF_ResetAllSettingsDialog:Show()
GF_UrlCopyFrame:Hide()
GF_EditPlayerNoteFrame:Hide()

if GF_EditPlayerNoteFrameEditBox:GetText() ~= "" then GF_PlayerNotes[GF_RealmName][GF_EditPlayerNoteFrameTitleLabel:GetText()] = GF_EditPlayerNoteFrameEditBox:GetText() else GF_PlayerNotes[GF_RealmName][GF_EditPlayerNoteFrameTitleLabel:GetText()] = nil end GF_UpdateResults() GF_EditPlayerNoteFrame:Hide()
GF_PlayerNotes[GF_RealmName][GF_EditPlayerNoteFrameTitleLabel:GetText()] = nil GF_UpdateResults() GF_EditPlayerNoteFrame:Hide()

Scripts.OnEnterPressed: if GF_EditPlayerNoteFrameEditBox:GetText() ~= "" then GF_PlayerNotes[GF_RealmName][GF_EditPlayerNoteFrameTitleLabel:GetText()] = GF_EditPlayerNoteFrameEditBox:GetText() else GF_PlayerNotes[GF_RealmName][GF_EditPlayerNoteFrameTitleLabel:GetText()] = nil end GF_UpdateResults() GF_EditPlayerNoteFrame:Hide()

Scripts.OnClick: GF_ShowGroupLogEntryFrame:Hide()

Scripts.OnHide:
GF_LFGSize:Hide() GF_LFGLFM:Hide() GF_LFGDungeon:Hide() GF_LFGRaid:Hide() GF_LFGRole:Hide() GF_GetWhoClass:Hide() GF_SearchList:Hide() GF_GetWhoFrame:Hide() GF_LFGFrame:Hide() GF_MessageFrame:Hide() GF_LogFilterDropdownMenu:Hide() GF_LogChannelFilterDropdownMenu:Hide() GF_LogChannelName:Hide() GF_GroupFilterDropdownMenu:Hide() GF_ChatFilterDropdownMenu:Hide() GF_LFGHardCore:Hide() GF_GroupChannelName:Hide() GF_FontName:Hide() GF_BlockList:Hide() GF_AutoBlacklistDropdownMenu:Hide()
GF_SavedVariables.mainframeishidden = true GF_SavedVariables.mainframestatus = 0 if pfUI and pfUI.chat and pfUI.chat.urlcopy then pfUI.chat.urlcopy:SetWidth(270) pfUI.chat.urlcopy.text:SetWidth(250) end

Scripts.OnClick: GF_PerCharVariables.dpsmetershown = false GF_DamageMeterFrame:Hide()

if GF_PerCharVariables.dpsmeter == 1 then GF_PerCharVariables.dpsmeter = getn(GF_BUTTONS_LIST["DPSMeter"]) else GF_PerCharVariables.dpsmeter = GF_PerCharVariables.dpsmeter - 1 end GF_DamageMeterFrameTitleLabel:SetText(GF_BUTTONS_LIST["DPSMeter"][GF_PerCharVariables.dpsmeter]) GF_UpdateDPSMeter()

if GF_PerCharVariables.dpsmeter == getn(GF_BUTTONS_LIST["DPSMeter"]) then GF_PerCharVariables.dpsmeter = 1 else GF_PerCharVariables.dpsmeter = GF_PerCharVariables.dpsmeter + 1 end GF_DamageMeterFrameTitleLabel:SetText(GF_BUTTONS_LIST["DPSMeter"][GF_PerCharVariables.dpsmeter]) GF_UpdateDPSMeter()
